matches.x: beit they buried him in the city of David, but not in the sepulchres of the kings. OHAPTER XXII. ; Ahaziah slain by Jehu—Athaliah usurpeth the kingdom. ND the inhabitants of Jerusalem made Ahaziah his youngest son king in: his stead; for the band of men that came with the Arabians to the camp had slain all the eldest.” So ‘Ahaziah the son of Jehoram king of Judah reigned. :
